notes: Shows success and failure popups for user actions with backend-provided failure reasons instead of raw 500 messages.
Adds stage-specific next-step guidance and disabled lifecycle buttons for incident, problem, and change workflows.
Allows closed incidents to be reopened with audit history and comments.
Fixes SLA compliance to include active incidents that are still inside SLA, not only closed incidents.
Allows new changes to link incidents at creation time and ensures newly created changes remain visible in the change register.
